GET /accounts/{account_id}/paygo-usage.description:
Returns billable usage data for PayGo (self-serve) accounts.
When no query parameters are provided, returns usage for the current
billing period.

schema.description: Represents a Cloudflare resource identifier tag.

parameters.description: Start date for the usage query (ISO 8601).
parameters.name: from

parameters.description: End date for the usage query (ISO 8601).
parameters.name: to

schema.description: Represents a successful response containing billable usage records.

errors.description: Contains error details if the request failed.

items.description: Represents an API notice or error detail.

code.description: Identifies the error or notice type.

messages.description: Contains informational notices about the response.

items.description: Represents an API notice or error detail.

code.description: Identifies the error or notice type.

result.description: Contains the array of billable usage records.

items.description: Represents a single billable usage record.

BillingPeriodStart.description: Indicates the start of the billing period.

ChargePeriodEnd.description: Indicates the end of the charge period.

ChargePeriodStart.description: Indicates the start of the charge period.

ConsumedQuantity.description: Specifies the quantity consumed during this charge period.

ConsumedUnit.description: A display name for the unit of measurement used for the product (for example, "GB-months", "GB-seconds"). May be empty when the unit is implicit in the service name.

ContractedCost.description: Specifies the cost for this charge period in the billing currency.

CumulatedContractedCost.description: Specifies the cumulated cost for the billing period in the billing currency.

CumulatedPricingQuantity.description: Specifies the cumulated pricing quantity for the billing period.

PricingQuantity.description: Specifies the pricing quantity for this charge period.

ServiceFamilyName.description: Identifies the product family for the Cloudflare service.

SubscriptionId.description: The identifier for the Cloudflare subscription.

ZoneId.description: The identifier for the Cloudflare zone (zone tag).

ZoneName.description: The display name of the Cloudflare zone.

success.description: Indicates whether the API call was successful.

200.description: Indicates PayGo account usage data was successfully retrieved.

errors.description: Contains error details describing why the request failed.

example.message: Invalid request parameters: Please ensure all required parameters are included and correctly formatted.

items.description: Represents an API notice or error detail.

code.description: Identifies the error or notice type.

messages.description: Contains informational notices about the response.

items.description: Represents an API notice or error detail.

code.description: Identifies the error or notice type.

result.description: Contains the response payload (always null on failure).

success.description: Indicates whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/paygo-usage.summary: Get PayGo Account Billable Usage (Version 1, Alpha)

GET /accounts/{account_id}/paygo-usage-i.description:
Returns high-level usage information for the account, including coverage,
and subscription metadata.

schema.description: Represents a Cloudflare resource identifier tag.
Represents a successful response containing subscription info.

errors.description: Contains error details if the request failed.

items.description: Represents an API notice or error detail.

code.description: Identifies the error or notice type.

messages.description: Contains any informational messages from the API.

items.description: Represents an API notice or error detail.

code.description: Identifies the error or notice type.

covered.description: Indicates whether the account is covered.

subscriptions.description: List of subscriptions for the account.

billing_cycle_anchor_timestamp.description: The subscription billing cycle anchor timestamp.

end_timestamp.description: The subscription end timestamp. Omitted for active subscriptions; present only when the subscription has been cancelled.

id.description: The identifier for the Cloudflare subscription.

success.description: Indicates whether the API call was successful.

200.description: Indicates PayGo account usage data was successfully retrieved.

errors.description: Contains error details describing why the request failed.

example.message: Invalid request parameters: Please ensure all required parameters are included and correctly formatted.

items.description: Represents an API notice or error detail.

code.description: Identifies the error or notice type.

messages.description: Contains informational notices about the response.

items.description: Represents an API notice or error detail.

code.description: Identifies the error or notice type.

result.description: Contains the response payload (always null on failure).

success.description: Indicates whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/paygo-usage-i.summary: Get PayGo Account Billable Usage Info (Version 1, Alpha)
